tagline: scroll-stress-test logs six commits toward randomized cursor mayhem
editionNote: One week, one repo, six commits burning through index scan edge cases.

articles.headline: scroll-stress-test advances its randomized torture chamber
articles.deck: @tvondra spent the week hardening tests for scrollable cursors on index scans.
articles.body: Six commits landed in scroll-stress-test this week, pushing forward the randomized stress testing apparatus for scrollable cursors during index scans. The work remains unpublished as a release, but the commit velocity suggests active refinement of the test harness itself. No major features or API changes announced, but the infrastructure work hints at preparation for either a release cycle or upstream integration.
articles.illustrationPrompt: mechanical gears spinning at different speeds inside a glass box, sparks flying, no labels

closingNote: Six commits, zero releases, infinite patience.
